subcodes.first_line: We make mention of the one who attained to the lights of the Kingdom when the Almighty appeared, invested with manifest sovereignty
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن فاز بانوار الملکوت اذ اتی الحق بسلطان مبین انا نذکر فی
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment
